title: Add ESLint plugin interface
relevance: HIGH - Direct competitor space: slopsquatting detection at lint time
body_excerpt: Add an ESLint plugin that checks import/require statements against the npm registry for slopsquatting at lint time, catching suspicious dependencies in the editor before they reach CI.

title: feat: Deprecation & Yanking (consumer-side lifecycle awareness)
relevance: MEDIUM - Package lifecycle awareness relates to stale API detection
body_excerpt: Add lifecycle state awareness to the CLI so users are warned about deprecated skills and blocked from installing yanked skills.

title: [RFC] Skill Signature Verification on Install
relevance: MEDIUM - Supply chain security for AI packages
body_excerpt: Add optional signature verification to npx skills add to ensure skill authenticity.

title: WAVE6 [HARNESS]: VerificationOracle — deterministic, zero-latency anti-hallucination
relevance: HIGH - Direct alignment: anti-hallucination for AI code
body_excerpt: Code LLMs hallucinate at every level: function names, module paths, type names, package names, and APIs that don't exist in the actual codebase.

title: API Surface Index: catch hallucinated package methods before agents generate broken imports
relevance: HIGH - Direct alignment: hallucinated package detection
body_excerpt: API Surface Index and MCP validate_import tool that validates package export/member references against local declaration files.

title: pdd sync silently runs pip install for missing packages without user consent
relevance: HIGH - AI-generated code creating phantom dependencies
body_excerpt: During pdd sync, when a PDD-generated example file crashes with ModuleNotFoundError, the function auto-runs pip install for any package name with no user confirmation.

title: Code generation ignores interface contracts: frontend/backend field and endpoint
relevance: HIGH - AI code generation ignoring contracts/schema
body_excerpt: When generating a full-stack project (Next.js + FastAPI), the LLM code generation step produces frontend code that doesn't match the backend schemas and endpoints.

title: [Server Request]: agent-guardrail
relevance: MEDIUM - Agent governance, related problem space
body_excerpt: Action-level governance for AI agents. Most guardrail solutions filter what agents say — this controls what they do.

title: [Server Request]: Rigour
relevance: MEDIUM - Competitor MCP server for AI code governance
body_excerpt: AI code governance — catches hallucinated imports, phantom APIs, code drift, and secret leakage from AI coding agents.

title: Epic: Solve Universal AI DevEx Friction (Hallucinations, Scope Creep, Testing)
relevance: HIGH - Direct alignment: AI DevEx friction points
body_excerpt: Hallucinated Package Versions, Scope Creep, Testing gaps - universal AI coding agent friction points.

title: [Standard] Conformance model — MUST/SHOULD/MAY with pass/fail criteria
relevance: MEDIUM - Standards for AI code quality conformance
body_excerpt: Define a formal conformance model for VCP standards using RFC 2119 language with objective pass/fail evidence.

title: Code Review Problems

body_excerpt: Codebase Assessment: Transitional — good structure and TypeScript configuration but inconsistencies in patterns.
